nodes.body: @ddl-viniatska Can we simply remove the python code related (commented) lines? It'll simply help with legibility when someone else runs the test and triages the result failure
Is this app file tailored to the edv test? Otherwise, we already have it in the e2e tests here: https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/blob/develop/e2e-tests/features/data/shiny-example-app/app.sh
can these API steps also replace others in this feature file?
I like that this is short... but is it enough of a description?
